description: Style Note Worry no longer about managing money, cards and coins in your tote bag! Organise your everyday essentials into this stylish wallet from baggit. This timeless piece is on the top of our wish-list this year. A sophisticated addition to your accessory collection, you can carry this piece in your hand or pop it into your bag. Product Details Pink wallet that has a flap style opening with a press buttoned closure Six card holders, one transparent id card holder and two insert pockets on one side Seven card holders on the other side of the flap with two insert pockets A fabric bow on the front and a zipped pocket at the back with branding Material and Care Blended corduroy fabric Wipe with clean, damp cloth to remove dirt Size 20 cm x 10 cm
